item.title: hyot-image-tools v1.0.0 (stable)
item.description:
## v1.0.0 — Initial stable release
### Tools (7) - **Reduce Size** — quality- or target-size compression - **Resize** — percentage, exact dimensions, or longest side - **Convert Format** — JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, TIFF - **Rotate / Flip** — angle, horizontal/vertical flip, EXIF auto-orient - **Crop** — aspect presets and interactive crop - **Merge Images** — horizontal, vertical, or grid layout - **Bulk Rename** — prefix, numbering, and padding
### Highlights - Drag-and-drop and folder import - Live preview for resize, rotate, and merge - Dark/light themes · Korean/English UI - Background batch processing with progress
